# Third-party components

This directory holds **upstream license files** for third-party source code that is **included or substantially derived** from external projects in this repository.

Runtime dependencies installed via PyPI are **not** copied here; their licenses are summarized in [`THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md`](../THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md) at the repository root.

| Subdirectory | Upstream project | Used in repo |
|--------------|------------------|--------------|
| [`dpm-solver/`](dpm-solver/) | [LuChengTHU/dpm-solver](https://github.com/LuChengTHU/dpm-solver) | [`ad_diffusion/utils/dpm_solver_pytorch.py`](../ad_diffusion/utils/dpm_solver_pytorch.py) |
